captured_by: test-designer (goal 060 leg B) — expected.*.json derived INDEPENDENTLY of any parser (no us_senate adapter exists at capture time), per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md: hand transcription from the raw fixture HTML (Pass A) cross-checked cell-by-cell against a second, fresh-context model transcription (Pass B); the only divergence was Pass B leaving the `&` entity undecoded (transcription-tool artifact, see conventions.entity_decoding)
spec: docs/regimes/us_senate.md (silver §4, details §5, mapping tables §3.2-§3.5, confidence §6, fixture selection + pins §7)

politeness.protocol: docs/regimes/us_senate.md §2.5 verbatim: real Chromium (Playwright chromium r1228, v149.0.7827.55, headed), STOCK UA untouched, contact identification via `From: ssm.leo@outlook.com` header on every request to senate.gov hosts, session dance §2.1, concurrency 1, >=2.2s spacing
politeness.user_agent: stock Chromium 149 UA (identified-UA strings are mechanically 403'd by the Akamai bot manager — §2.5/E13; identification rides the From header instead)
politeness.breakdown: 3 short sessions: 2 aborted client-config probes (2 origin GETs each; ended CLIENT-side — no origin 4xx: a context-global From header leaked onto third-party CDN script loads, whose CORS preflights failed and killed the page's jQuery, so the agreement form never submitted) + 1 capture session (agreement dance GET+POST+redirect = 4, then 4 pinned view GETs). Fix between sessions: scope the From header to senate.gov hosts via route interception. Zero 403s, zero 429s.

single_row_child_bond.notes: happy path + Child owner (gold `dependent`), null ticker (`--` sentinel), Corporate Bond -> `bond`, asset-detail sub-line (Rate/Coupon + Matures) => the only sub-1.0 confidence row (§6: 1.00 - 0.02)

multi_row_sale_partial.notes: multi-row document order = printed # DESCENDING (3,2,1 => row_ordinal 1,2,3); ticker anchors (ORCL/NVDA); Sale (Partial) -> sell + partial_sale true; Self + Spouse owners; two bands

amendment_restatement_18row.notes: title suffix `(Amendment 1)` => details.amendment_number 1 on every row; NO supersession linkage exists in the document (SAF §3.6) so filing/record supersedes stay NULL — the promotion machinery (outside GoldCandidate, not asserted here) opens review_task `ptr_amendment_unlinked` per amended record; 18 Joint rows incl. one Sale (Full) ($50,001 - $100,000 band); restates the amended original with exactly 3 Ticker cells fixed (SPYM/FTGC/ACN)

amended_original_3row_delta.notes: the amended ORIGINAL (same day, 8 min before the amendment; note Boozman also filed a THIRD same-titled 15-row original at 9:46 AM — E8 — so (filer, for-date) never identifies a document); rows #11/#4/#1 carry the name-embedded-ticker quirk: Ticker cell `--` (=> ticker_raw null) while asset_name_raw starts `SPYM - `/`FTGC - `/`ACN - ` — asset_name_raw stays VERBATIM, never split (invariant 3: no entity guessing)

conformance_conventions.silver_shape: expected.silver.json is the serialization of Vec<pipeline StagingRow>: [{payload, confidence}] — same wrapper as us_house. payload carries every docs/regimes/us_senate.md §4 field EXCEPT confidence, which lives at the wrapper's top-level `confidence` (f32); no duplication inside payload.
conformance_conventions.confidence_literals: f32 scored per SAF §6, serialized through serde_json's f32->f64 cast: rows with an asset_detail sub-line score 1.00 - 0.02 = 0.98f32 whose exact f64 image is 0.9800000190734863 (same convention as us_house T8b — do NOT 'fix' the literal); all other fixture rows score 1.00 and MUST be the JSON float literal 1.0 — never integer 1, which serde_json parses as a PosInt Number that deep-compares UNEQUAL to Float 1.0.
conformance_conventions.details_nulls: Optional details fields are serialized as explicit nulls (no skip_serializing_if) so the (us_senate, transaction) contract surface is fully visible in every candidate: ticker, asset_detail, comment, amendment_number are null when absent.
conformance_conventions.entity_decoding: Silver stores TEXT, not markup: HTML entities decode during text extraction (html5ever text nodes, SAF §6), so `iShares Core S&P 500 ETF` in the raw bytes is `iShares Core S&P 500 ETF` in asset_name_raw. The `--` empty-cell sentinel maps to null (ticker_raw, comment_raw); it never appears verbatim in Silver.
conformance_conventions.row_order: row_ordinal is 1-based DOCUMENT order (top-to-bottom); the printed # cell descends N..1 and is kept verbatim in row_number_raw / details.row_number (SAF §3.1; contiguity is a §3.7 parse-time integrity check, not asserted in expecteds).
conformance_conventions.notified_date: null on every gold row — the Senate electronic PTR has NO notification-date column (SAF §5.1; divergence from us_house).
conformance_conventions.extractor: us_senate_ptr/html@1 (deterministic scraper path; the LLM seam tag us_senate_ptr/llm@1 is reserved for paper filings, not fixtured on the green path)

conformance_ids.rationale: View pages carry no ULIDs and conformance runs with pool: None, so filing/politician/regime ids cannot be resolved from a roster. These fixed Crockford-valid ULID constants are the contract the adapter must emit in conformance mode (production resolves real ids from Postgres). Filing ids embed the report UUID's first hex group (uppercased — hex digits are Crockford-valid) for auditability, mirroring us_house's DocID embedding.
conformance_ids.politician_key_note: keys are the h2.filedReport parenthetical `(Last, First)` verbatim — the SAF §2.4 resolution input; pool-backed runs resolve via politician_alias within the US Senate mandate roster

builder_notes.input_bytes: input.html files are the RAW response bytes of GET /search/view/ptr/{uuid}/ — byte-identical to the docs/regimes/us_senate/evidence/ archives and to the SAF §7 pins (re-verified live at this capture); parse from raw bytes, no DOM re-serialization.
builder_notes.report_uuid_threading: the page never prints its own UUID — conformance mode must thread report_uuid from the fixture case (production: FilingRef.external_id). The four UUIDs are in cases.*.report_uuid above.
builder_notes.conformance_registry: crates/pipeline/src/conformance.rs details_schema() has NO (us_senate, transaction) arm yet — the harness fails closed on it. Builder leg: add the arm + snapshot-commit crates/pipeline/schemas/details/us_senate.transaction.json (schema-contracts skill bootstrap order), and ship a `conformance_entry` bin (unique name — Windows exe-clobber lesson) so `cargo run -p pipeline --bin conformance -- us_senate` dispatches.
builder_notes.fetch_client: SAF §2.5: plain reqwest is 403-bound on view GETs. Capture-time addendum: if the fetch engine is a browser sidecar, scope the From header to senate.gov hosts (network-layer injection) — a context-global extra header leaks onto third-party CDN loads and their CORS preflights kill the page's jQuery (breaks the agreement dance).

evidence: docs/regimes/us_senate/evidence/ — fixture bytes archived sha-named (E4-E7) in the spec-leg commit; this capture's session/politeness record: 2026-07-05-efd-fixture-capture-060b.retrieval.json
